stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct concerning the typical weather in a warm sector in mid- and high latitudes over continental areas during summer?

options.a: Moderate to poor visibility, fog or stratus, stratocumulus and drizzle
options.b: Generally moderate to good visibility, haze, sometimes few or scattered cumulus
options.c: Overcast by medium and high clouds, stratus with drizzle, poor visibility
options.d: Generally good visibility outside the frequent showers of CBs
